task_description: Run comprehensive QA testing on the Rental Property Management PWA app and fix all identified issues. Then update the PRD to reflect current implementation state.

verification.summary: Backend imports all 40+ modules successfully. Frontend TypeScript compiles with zero errors (strict mode). Frontend production build succeeds with code-split chunks (largest initial: 287 KB). PWA icons generated and present. PRD updated with Google OAuth and Organization management documentation.
